ValidationRule.description: Rule to ensure that time is in15 min intervals.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: IF( NOT(ISBLANK(End_Date_Time__c)), NOT( OR( (Total_Work_Time__c - FLOOR(Total_Work_Time__c)) = 0.00, (Total_Work_Time__c - FLOOR(Total_Work_Time__c)) = 0.25, (Total_Work_Time__c - FLOOR(Total_Work_Time__c)) = 0.50, (Total_Work_Time__c - FLOOR(Total_Work_Time__c)) = 0.75 ) ), FALSE )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please make sure your time is in 15min intervals. For example 4hrs and 15min = 4.25
